'''lojadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:readied|readied]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-j-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:readied|readied]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lojadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lojadhithi|lojadhithi]] || [[word:lojadhiji|lojadhiji]] || [[word:lojadhishi|lojadhishi]] || [[word:lojadhiki|lojadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lojadhuthuthu|lojadhuthuthu]] || [[word:lojadhujuju|lojadhujuju]] || [[word:lojadhushushu|lojadhushushu]] || [[word:lojadhukuku|lojadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lojadhuthu|lojadhuthu]] || [[word:lojadhuju|lojadhuju]] || [[word:lojadhushu|lojadhushu]] || [[word:lojadhuku|lojadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lojadhufthuf|lojadhufthuf]] || [[word:lojadhufjuf|lojadhufjuf]] || [[word:lojadhufshuf|lojadhufshuf]] || [[word:lojadhufkuf|lojadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lojadhethe|lojadhethe]] || [[word:lojadheje|lojadheje]] || [[word:lojadheshe|lojadheshe]] || [[word:lojadheke|lojadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lojadhothotho|lojadhothotho]] || [[word:lojadhojojo|lojadhojojo]] || [[word:lojadhoshosho|lojadhoshosho]] || [[word:lojadhokoko|lojadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lojadhotho|lojadhotho]] || [[word:lojadhojo|lojadhojo]] || [[word:lojadhosho|lojadhosho]] || [[word:lojadhoko|lojadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lojadhofthof|lojadhofthof]] || [[word:lojadhofjof|lojadhofjof]] || [[word:lojadhofshof|lojadhofshof]] || [[word:lojadhofkof|lojadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lojadhĂŻfthĂŻf|lojadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lojadhĂŻfjĂŻf|lojadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lojadhĂŻfshĂŻf|lojadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lojadhĂŻfkĂŻf|lojadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lojadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|lojadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lojadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|lojadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lojadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|lojadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lojadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|lojadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lojadhĂŻfthĂŻf|lojadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lojadhĂŻfjĂŻf|lojadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lojadhĂŻfshĂŻf|lojadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lojadhĂŻfkĂŻf|lojadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lojadhĂŻfthĂŻf|lojadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lojadhĂŻfjĂŻf|lojadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lojadhĂŻfshĂŻf|lojadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lojadhĂŻfkĂŻf|lojadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lojadhĂŠthĂŠ|lojadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:lojadhĂŠjĂŠ|lojadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:lojadhĂŠshĂŠ|lojadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:lojadhĂŠkĂŠ|lojadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lojadhathatha|lojadhathatha]] || [[word:lojadhajaja|lojadhajaja]] || [[word:lojadhashasha|lojadhashasha]] || [[word:lojadhakaka|lojadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lojadhatha|lojadhatha]] || [[word:lojadhaja|lojadhaja]] || [[word:lojadhasha|lojadhasha]] || [[word:lojadhaka|lojadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lojadhafthaf|lojadhafthaf]] || [[word:lojadhafjaf|lojadhafjaf]] || [[word:lojadhafshaf|lojadhafshaf]] || [[word:lojadhafkaf|lojadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lojadhasha|lojadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lojadhshĂ«sha|lojadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lojadhrosha|lojadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lojadhmusha|lojadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lojadhyasha|lojadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golojadhnkshĂ«sha|golojadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golojadhnkrosha|golojadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golojadhnkmusha|golojadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golojadhnkyasha|golojadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lojajadhasha|lojajadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lojajadhshĂ«sha|lojajadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lojajadhrosha|lojajadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lojajadhmusha|lojajadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lojajadhyasha|lojajadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golojajadhnkshĂ«sha|golojajadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golojajadhnkrosha|golojajadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golojajadhnkmusha|golojajadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golojajadhnkyasha|golojajadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lejĂŠdhasha|lejĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lejĂŠdhshĂ«sha|lejĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lejĂŠdhrosha|lejĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lejĂŠdhmusha|lejĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lejĂŠdhyasha|lejĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golejĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|golejĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golejĂŠdhnkrosha|golejĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golejĂŠdhnkmusha|golejĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golejĂŠdhnkyasha|golejĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lojfadhasha|lojfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lojfadhshĂ«sha|lojfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lojfadhrosha|lojfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lojfadhmusha|lojfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lojfadhyasha|lojfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golojfadhnkshĂ«sha|golojfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golojfadhnkrosha|golojfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golojfadhnkmusha|golojfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golojfadhnkyasha|golojfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
